headline: Canadian defined benefit pension plans show increased funded levels in Q2: Aon
summary: Aon plc (NYSE: AON), a leading global professional services firm, announced today that the aggregate funded ratio for Canadian pension plans in the S&P/TSX Composite Index increased to 116.7 percent compared to 111.4 percent at the end of last quarter, according to the Aon Pension Risk Tracker.

content.title: Canadian defined benefit pension plans show increased funded levels in Q2: Aon
content.summary: Aon plc (NYSE: AON), a leading global professional services firm, announced today that the aggregate funded ratio for Canadian pension plans in the S&P/TSX Composite Index increased to 116.7 percent compared to 111.4 percent at the end of last quarter, according to the Aon Pension Risk Tracker.

thumbnail.caption:
Aon plc (NYSE: AON) exists to shape decisions for the better — to protect and enrich the lives of people around the world. Through actionable analytic insight, globally integrated Risk Capital and Human Capital expertise, and locally relevant solutions, our colleagues in over 120 countries provide our clients with the clarity and confidence to make better risk and people decisions that protect and grow their businesses.

 

Follow Aon on LinkedIn, X, Facebook and Instagram. Stay up-to-date by visiting Aon’s newsroom and sign up for news alerts here.
